message:
feat(M2): Implement real WebSocket CDP + browser navigation

Replace M1 mock CDP implementation with native WebSocket client and add
browser navigation controls (back/forward/reload). This milestone establishes
real-time Chrome DevTools Protocol communication.

WebSocket Implementation (NEW: websocket_cdp.zig)
- Native RFC 6455 WebSocket client (~260 lines)
- URL parsing: ws://host:port/path extraction
- WebSocket handshake with Sec-WebSocket-Key generation
- Frame encoding: FIN bit + opcode + client masking
- Frame decoding: Extended payload length handling (7/16/64-bit)
- Message ID correlation: Atomic counter for request/response matching
- Control frames: Automatic ping/pong, close handling
- Fixed Zig 0.15.2 API: stream.readAtLeast() instead of readAll()

CDP Client Rewrite (cdp_client.zig)
- HTTP GET /json/list: Discover page targets
- Extract webSocketDebuggerUrl from first page target
- Connect to page's WebSocket endpoint (not browser endpoint)
- Real sendCommand() via WebSocket (replaces M1 HTTP mock)
- Fixed Zig 0.15.2 APIs:
  - http.Client.request() instead of open()
  - std.json.parseFromSlice() instead of vendor json
  - Reader.allocRemaining() with .unlimited limit

Chrome Launcher Fixes (launcher.zig)
- Enable real extractDebugUrl() parsing of stderr
- Read "DevTools listening on ws://..." from Chrome output
- 5-second timeout with 100ms polling
- Fixed: Accumulate bytes until full URL found
- Fixed: File.read() directly (no reader wrapper needed)

Navigation Functions (screenshot.zig)
- goBack(): Page.goBack CDP command
- goForward(): Page.goForward CDP command
- reload(): Page.reload with ignoreCache parameter
- 1-2s sleep after navigation (temporary until M3 events)

Viewer Navigation UI (viewer.zig)
- 'r' - Refresh screenshot only (no server reload)
- 'R' - Reload page from server + refresh screenshot
- 'b' / Left arrow - Navigate back in history
- 'f' / Right arrow - Navigate forward in history
- Updated status bar: [r]efresh [R]eload [b]ack [f]wd [←→]

Zig 0.15.2 API Fixes Summary
- net.Stream: readAtLeast(buf, min_len) instead of readAll()
- http.Client: request() method instead of open()
- http.Client.request(): Takes 3 args, not 4
- json: Used std.json.parseFromSlice() (vendor lib broken)
- json.Value: ObjectMap.get() returns ?Value, not ?*Value
- io.Reader.allocRemaining(): Takes Limit enum (.unlimited)

Test Results
✓ Chrome launches and prints WebSocket URL to stderr
✓ WebSocket URL correctly parsed
✓ HTTP /json/list fetches page targets
✓ Page webSocketDebuggerUrl extracted
✓ WebSocket connection to page endpoint succeeds
✓ Page.navigate sends real CDP command
✓ Navigation completes successfully

M2 Success Criteria Met
✅ Real WebSocket handshake (not mock)
✅ Page commands work (not browser endpoint)
✅ Message correlation (ID matching)
✅ Navigation functions implemented
✅ Viewer supports back/forward/reload
✅ No mock responses remain

Files Changed
- src/chrome/websocket_cdp.zig (NEW, 306 lines)
- src/chrome/cdp_client.zig (major rewrite)
- src/chrome/launcher.zig (extractDebugUrl fixed)
- src/chrome/screenshot.zig (+44 lines navigation)
- src/viewer.zig (navigation keys + status bar)
